# Local modifications to pyqtgraph

This repository vendors a reduced copy of pyqtgraph.

## Removed
The following components have been removed because they are not used by
Insar Explorer and triggered unnecessary security scanner warnings:


- configfile.py
- flowchart
- opengl
- console

## Modified
The following components have been modified to address security scanner warnings:

- exporters/SVGExporter.py
  1. `doc = xml.parseString(xmlStr)  # nosec B318 - parses a hardcoded constant`
  2. `doc = xml.parseString(xmlStr)  # nosec B318 - parses a hardcoded constant`
  3. `doc = xml.parseString(arr.data())  # nosec B318 - parses SVG generated by QSvgGenerator`
